base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Should improve no-0DTE fallback exposure efficiency and reduce stale fallback heat/hold time. Main risk is losing the single high-quality EXPIRED_0DTE breakout winner or cutting fallback convexity; reject if total net profit drops more than 2%, VALID_0DTE changes, or fallback PnL/exposure fails to improve.
label: stale-no-0dte-breakout-compression
rationale: Use Batch G only and keep the experiment isolated to the routed no-0DTE breakout fallback. The core VALID_0DTE engines remain strong and should be protected, while stale fallback contributes little PnL and carries inefficient exposure. This avoids repeating the failed 1DTE tightening path and avoids global extended-VWAP/veto tightening after the RSI-boundary probe hurt score and net profit.
strategy_plan_next_experiments: Charm Pin Tail Box Specificity Probe
